reason_for_decision: The article now explains spectrum monitoring as an evidence-producing workflow with better operational framing, sufficient depth, and cleaner editorial control.
strengths: It now distinguishes measurement from interpretation, which improves technical accuracy.
The distributed-versus-centralized discussion makes the architecture implications clearer.
The encoding issue and weak ending have been corrected.
summary_assessment: This version passes. It is substantially more useful than the earlier draft and is now suitable for automation-grade review output.
